heading: Little River Canyon National Preserve; establishment
label: 698q Little River Canyon National Preserve; establishment
notes: Amendments2009—Subsec. (b). , designated existing provisions as par. (1), inserted heading, and added par. (2).Pub. L. 111–11, § 7103(1)Subsec. (c). , substituted “maps” for “map” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 111–11, § 7103(2)

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–427, § 1106 Stat. 2179Oct. 21, 1992“This Act [enacting this section and sections 698r to 698t of this title] may be cited as the ‘Little River Canyon National Preserve Act of 1992’.”
amendments: Amendments2009—Subsec. (b). , designated existing provisions as par. (1), inserted heading, and added par. (2).Pub. L. 111–11, § 7103(1)Subsec. (c). , substituted “maps” for “map” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 111–11, § 7103(2)

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–427, § 1106 Stat. 2179Oct. 21, 1992“This Act [enacting this section and sections 698r to 698t of this title] may be cited as the ‘Little River Canyon National Preserve Act of 1992’.”

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In order to protect and preserve the natural, scenic, recreational, and cultural resources of the Little River Canyon area in DeKalb and Cherokee Counties, Alabama, and to provide for the protection and public enjoyment of the resources, there is established the Little River Canyon National Preserve (referred to in sections 698q to 698t of this title as the “Preserve”).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Preserve shall consist of the lands, waters, and interests in lands and waters generally depicted on the boundary map entitled “Little River Canyon National Preserve”, numbered NA–LRNP–80,001C, and dated March 1992.

children.heading: Boundary expansion
children.label: 2 Boundary expansion
children.text: The boundary of the Preserve is modified to include the land depicted on the map entitled “Little River Canyon National Preserve Proposed Boundary”, numbered 152/80,004, and dated December 2007.
be on file and available for public inspection in the offices of the National Park Service of the Department of the Interior in Washington, District of Columbia; and
be filed with the appropriate offices of DeKalb and Cherokee Counties in the State of Alabama.

children.heading: Publication of description
children.label: d Publication of description
children.text: Not later than 6 months after , the Secretary of the Interior (referred to in sections 698q to 698t of this title as the “Secretary”) shall publish in the Federal Register a detailed description of the boundaries of the Preserve.October 21, 1992
